common.privacyNotice: Your API key and data are stored locally in your browser to ensure privacy. If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us via the community or feedback page.
common.dragAndDropText: Click or drag file here to upload
common.noTargetLanguage: Select at least one target language
common.singleFileModeTooltip: Keep only one file; new uploads replace the current file
common.hideResultsTooltip: Hide result preview to prevent page lag from large content
common.directExportTooltip: Automatically download after processing, skipping result preview
common.useCacheTooltip: Reuse previous translation cache to speed up processing
common.contextAwareTranslationTooltip: Translate with context for better coherence and accuracy (AI models only)
common.multiLanguageModeTooltip: Translate to multiple languages simultaneously, saved as separate files
common.resetUploadTooltip: Clear current input and uploaded files
common.sameLanguageTarget: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted target to
common.sameLanguageSource: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted source to
common.enterApiKey: Enter API Key or switch to Free API
common.enterApiUrl: Please configure the API URL in 'API Settings'
common.deepLXUnavailable: DeepLX node unavailable, automatically switched to GTX API (Free)
common.deeplUnavailable: DeepL node unavailable, please check configuration in 'API Settings'
common.llmUnavailable: LLM node unavailable, please check configuration in 'API Settings'
common.noFileUploaded: Please upload a file to process first
common.sourceTextPlaceholder: Enter or paste text to process...
common.noSourceText: Please enter or paste text content
common.formatTooltip: Format: remove blank lines and trim leading/trailing spaces
common.resultToSourceTooltip: Overwrite input area with result text
common.readOnlyModeTooltip: Text is too long; automatically switched to read-only mode to maintain page performance
common.clearInputTooltip: Clear input content and uploaded files
common.removeCharsAfterTranslationTooltip: Automatically remove specified characters after translation (separate multiple with spaces)
common.multiLangSettingsHint: Enter language codes, separated by comma or space.
common.retryCountTooltip: Number of retry attempts when translation fails
common.requestTimeoutSecTooltip: Maximum wait per request (seconds). LLM thinking takes longer; 180s or more recommended.
common.customExportFilenameTooltip: '{'name'}' = original filename, '{'lang'}' = language, '{'ext'}' = extension, '{'date'}' = date, '{'time'}' = time
common.partialFailureDesc: Auto-retry couldn't recover them. Failed lines kept the original text. Click Retry (successful lines are served from cache) or view the failed lines to handle them manually.
common.gtxFreeAPIUnavailable: The free Google Translate API (GTX) is currently unavailable. Please check your network connection.
common.translategemmaUnavailable: TranslateGemma node unavailable. Please verify the local server (LM Studio / llama.cpp / Ollama) is running and the URL is correct.

MDTranslator.clientDescription: Upload Markdown files or paste text. Intelligently preserves format, code, and formulas. One-click translate to multiple languages.
MDTranslator.tLatexTooltip: Translate LaTeX formulas (avoid if currency symbols etc. are misidentified)
MDTranslator.rawTranslationModeTooltip: Skip Markdown parsing; output doesn't need to strictly preserve original formatting
MDTranslator.contextAwareRawNote: When enabled, translation runs in plain-text mode and Markdown formatting is ignored.

TranslationSettings.deeplxUrlExtra: Optional, leave empty for default node
TranslationSettings.customApiHelp: Works with any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint — local servers (Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM) or cloud aggregators (Together AI / Fireworks AI / etc).
TranslationSettings.modelExtra: LLM Model Name, check API docs for available models
TranslationSettings.temperatureExtra: Temperature (0-2): Higher is more random, lower is more deterministic. Recommended: 0.2-0.8
TranslationSettings.systemPromptExtra: System prompt for LLM translation, leave empty for default
TranslationSettings.userPromptExtra: Custom translation prompt, leave empty for default. Variables:
TranslationSettings.chunkSizeExtra: Multi-line text (Subtitles, Markdown) will be split by this size
TranslationSettings.batchSizeExtra: Concurrent translation requests in line-by-line mode. Used by machine translation and LLMs without context. Too high may trigger API rate limiting.
TranslationSettings.contextBatchSizeExtra: Parallel batches in LLM context mode. Each batch is heavy. Default 3 is safe for most services; raise on paid tiers.
TranslationSettings.contextWindowExtra: Lines per batch in context mode. Higher values give better context but may exceed model token limits.
TranslationSettings.useRelayTooltip: Enable API relay if you encounter CORS or 403 errors
TranslationSettings.enableThinkingTooltip: Enable thinking / reasoning mode for supported models
TranslationSettings.reasoningEffortExtra: Higher effort is usually more accurate but slower and consumes more tokens
TranslationSettings.presetEmptyHint: No presets yet — edit and click Save
TranslationSettings.sendSystemPromptExtra: Turn off only when the chat template rejects the system role — typical error "Conversations must start with a user prompt" (e.g. Gemma family).
TranslationSettings.globalPromptsExtra: All LLM services share these prompts; switching services will not reset them

mdTranslator.title: Markdown Translator
mdTranslator.description: Batch translate Markdown, preserving format and code
mdTranslator.metaTitle: Markdown Translator | Preserve Format, Code & LaTeX Online
mdTranslator.metaDescription: Need to translate docs? MDTranslator keeps formatting, code blocks & LaTeX intact. Supports DeepSeek & AI models. Batch translate your knowledge base now!

faq.q: How to preserve code blocks and formulas when translating Markdown?
faq.a: The tool automatically detects and skips code blocks, LaTeX formulas, links, and other formatting elements, translating only plain text to keep your technical docs publishable after translation.

faq.q: What tool can batch-translate technical blog posts?
faq.a: MDTranslator supports batch uploading multiple Markdown files for one-click translation. It preserves Front Matter metadata so translated posts deploy directly to Hugo, Jekyll, Hexo, and other blog frameworks.

faq.q: What is the best free Markdown translation tool?
faq.a: MDTranslator is completely free and open source, supporting Google free translation and AI models like DeepSeek. Unlike generic translators, it intelligently preserves Markdown syntax so you never need to manually fix formatting after translation.

howto.name: Upload Markdown
howto.text: Upload one or more .md files, or paste Markdown content into the input area.

howto.name: Configure options
howto.text: Choose whether to translate Front Matter, code blocks, and LaTeX formulas based on your needs.

howto.name: Translate and export
howto.text: Select target language and click Translate. Download translated .md files with formatting preserved.

features: Preserves code blocks, LaTeX formulas, and links during translation
Batch Markdown file upload and translation
Compatible with Hugo, Jekyll, Hexo blog frameworks
Raw mode ignores Markdown formatting for plain translation
